heading: Reports relating to coins and currency received in nonfinancial trade or business
label: 5331 Reports relating to coins and currency received in nonfinancial trade or business
notes: References in TextSection 6050I(g) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), is classified to , Internal Revenue Code.section 6050I of Title 26

children.heading: $10,000.—Coin and Currency Receipts of More Than
children.label: a $10,000.—Coin and Currency Receipts of More Than
A
children.text: who is engaged in a trade or business, and

children.label: B
children.text: who, in the course of such trade or business, receives more than $10,000 in coins or currency in 1 transaction (or 2 or more related transactions), or
who is required to file a report under section 6050I(g) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986,
is in such form as the Secretary may prescribe;

children.label: A
children.text: the name and address, and such other identification information as the Secretary may require, of the person from whom the coins or currency was received;

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of coins or currency received;

children.label: C
children.text: the date and nature of the transaction; and

children.label: D
children.text: such other information, including the identification of the person filing the report, as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: .—Amounts received by financial institutions
children.label: 1 .—Amounts received by financial institutions
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply to amounts received in a transaction reported under section 5313 and regulations prescribed under such section.

children.heading: .—Transactions occurring outside the united states
children.label: 2 .—Transactions occurring outside the united states
children.text: Except to the extent provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary, subsection (a) shall not apply to any transaction if the entire transaction occurs outside the United States.

children.heading: Currency Includes Foreign Currency and Certain Monetary Instruments.—
children.label: d Currency Includes Foreign Currency and Certain Monetary Instruments.—
B
children.text: to the extent provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary, any monetary instrument (whether or not in bearer form) with a face amount of not more than $10,000.

children.heading: .—Scope of application
children.label: 2 .—Scope of application
children.text: Paragraph (1)(B) shall not apply to any check drawn on the account of the writer in a financial institution referred to in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), (E), (F), (G), (J), (K), (R), or (S) of section 5312(a)(2).
